prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-PPECRG-LG-GRN-3 Product Type: PRETEND_PLAY_TOY Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: KidPlay Toys Pretend Cash Register with Play Money and Groceries Description: This electronic cash register for kids has it all-pretend play money, groceries, fun, interactive sounds and more, endless hours of supermarket shopping and pretend play checkout await. The cash register toy from KidPlay, available in either green or pink (while quantities last), also features a moveable conveyor belt, working cash drawer, card swipe, barcode scanner and intercom microphone speaker too. Little ones will have a blast running friends or family through the grocery line as the in-house expert cashier.

And, in addition to the cash register and all its fantastic playtime fun features, your little ones will also get a cute shopping basket to house all their goodies including, pretend play money-both coins and cash bills-a debit card, a juice box, creamer, a milk jug, a box of biscuits and a pack of strawberry jello.

The KidPlay Electronic Cash Register for kids is a fun way for kids and toddlers to learn about the value of money, math, cash handling skills, as well as developing their social interaction, fine motor and critical thinking skills too, as they prepare, scan, organize and checkout your grocery store purchases; combining tactile, auditory and visual learning, this kids electronic pretend play cash register is a great gift to promote fun and learning with your little ones. The electronic cash register for kids in pink or green is not just useful for introducing kids to math-related concepts, counting or cash handling, it's also a great tool for them to learn about fruit, vegetables, colors, shapes and sounds too.

No assembly is required so the fun can start right out of the box. Ready, set... shop.

BATTERIES: Included with purchase

WARNING: Choking Hazard (small parts)

AGE: 3+ Search Terms: cash register for kids toy play girls toys 3 year old 6 gifts 4 5 hair accessories age 8 2 toddler 7 the birthday lights sounds singing her baby girl shower masochist sister with all 10 9 fun cute learning resources deep olds games boys 4-5 costumes Features: - READY SET SHOP: This electronic cash register for kids has it all-pretend play money, groceries, fun, interactive sounds and more, endless hours of supermarket shopping and pretend play checkout await! The cash register toy from KidPlay, available in either green or pink, also features a moveable conveyor belt, working cash drawer, card swipe, barcode scanner and intercom microphone speaker too! - HAVE FUN WHILE LEARNING: The KidPlay Electronic Cash Register for kids is a fun way for kids and toddlers to learn about the value of money, math, cash handling skills, as well as developing their social interaction, fine motor and critical thinking skills too, as they prepare, scan, organize and checkout your grocery store purchases; Combining tactile, auditory and visual learning, this cash register is a great gift to promote fun and learning with your little ones! - MORE THAN JUST MATH: The electronic cash register for kids in pink or green is not just useful for introducing kids to math-related concepts, counting or cash handling, it's also a great tool for them to learn about fruit, vegetables, colors, shapes and sounds too; no assembly is required so the fun can start right out of the box! - FUN PLAYTIME ACCESSORIES: In addition to the cash register and all its fantastic playtime fun features, your little ones will also get a cute shopping basket to house all their goodies including, pretend play money-both coins and cash bills-a debit card, a juice box, creamer, a milk jug, a box of biscuits and a pack of strawberry jello - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 14 x 6 x 8 inches; Color: Multi; Material: Plastic; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Batteries: Included; Age: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
